Event: Royal Challenge - Season 39
Event Date: 01/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A231
Purple Lasso

Triggers: 7 sec

Gorgon's Touch
The artifact owner turns a random enemy unit into a boulder, petrifies 2 of the remaining enemy units, and stuns the rest of the enemy units for 3 sec.
The initial target can't move and takes 45% more damage. The target also takes 175000 magic damage every second for the duration.
When the effect runs out, the target explodes. The explosion deals 150000 pure damage to the target, and their physical and magic armor are reduced by 30% for 3 sec. 2 nearby enemies are hit by rocks. The rocks deal 300000 physical damage on impact and stun for 2 sec.
Petrified enemy units can't move and take 35% more damage.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
